assessment.approach: The challenge requires interacting with the /api/lattice/seed endpoint to obtain a runId and a capsule identifier. The capsule identifier must be base64url encoded and sent as a Bearer token in the Authorization header to the /api/lattice/unseal endpoint, along with the runId in the request body. I will perform these two steps sequentially to satisfy the challenge requirements.
evidenceUsed: PUT /api/lattice/unseal requires Authorization: Bearer <base64url(capsule)> and body {runId}
uncertainties: None, the API pattern is consistent across all provided evidence.
